reviews.review_title: My Living Room Has Never Felt So Magical
reviews.review_description: This is exactly the kind of experience I wanted from mixed reality. Planting orbs around my living room and watching them bloom felt genuinely magical, the bioluminescent grass spreading across my floor was a wow moment. I love how tactile it is: cupping orbs to nurture them, drawing constellations, even punching them across the room when you're feeling playful. The butterflies and shooting stars add so much atmosphere. It's my go-to for unwinding after a long day. Beautiful work.
